name: Rtk Rewrite
description: rtk-hook-version: 3 RTK Claude Code hook — rewrites commands to use rtk for token savings. Requires: rtk >= 0.23.0, jq This is a thin delegating hook: all rewrite logic lives in `rtk rewrite`, which is the single source of truth (src/discover/registry.rs). To add or change rewrite rules, edit the Rust registry — not this file. Exit code protocol for `rtk rewrite`: 0 + stdout Rewrite found, no deny/ask rule matched → auto-allow 1 No RTK equivalent → pass through unchanged 2 De
author: Lucas Santana
